businessProfile.name: Example Plumbing
businessProfile.summary: Example Plumbing helps Western Sydney homeowners with emergency plumbing, blocked drains, leak detection, and clear repair advice.

contentProfile.suggestedIdea: Show how Example Plumbing quickly resolves urgent home plumbing issues to bring peace of mind and convenience to busy homeowners.

visualDirections: Show plumbers actively fixing blocked drains or leaks
Depict clear, easy-to-understand repair advice being given
avoidRules: Avoid overly technical or jargon-heavy visuals
Avoid staged or unrealistic service scenarios

sourceProfile.voiceSourceText: Example Plumbing helps Western Sydney homeowners with emergency plumbing, blocked drains, leak detection, and clear repair advice.
sourceProfile.founderLanePreview: Example Plumbing helps Western Sydney homeowners with emergency plumbing, blocked drains, leak detection, and clear repair advice.

founderVoice.positioning: A reliable plumbing service provider dedicated to assisting Western Sydney homeowners with urgent and essential plumbing needs.
founderVoice.structure: Straightforward description of services offered, emphasizing emergency and repair assistance.
founderVoice.voiceSummary: The brand voice is practical and dependable, focusing on delivering clear and useful information to homeowners facing plumbing issues. It reflects a commitment to being a helpful and trustworthy resource in emergency situations.
doRules: Use clear and simple language to describe services
Focus on practical solutions for common plumbing problems
dontRules: Avoid technical jargon that might confuse customers
Do not use exaggerated claims or emotional appeals
Refrain from including personal opinions or customer testimonials

lifeMoments: Noticing a slow or blocked drain
microProblems: Uncertainty about cost and repair options
valueOutcomes: Clear guidance on repair needs and costs
Peace of mind with stopped leaks and flowing drains
repeatBenefits: Reduced worry about ongoing plumbing issues
Trusted advice that saves time and money

founderVisibilitySignals: Founder presence is still limited in the current public signal

strengths: The business has real product or service substance that can be turned into public signal
The offer is clear enough to support stronger value-led content
The audience is visible enough to shape more direct communication
There are real-world use cues that can make the content more believable
weakPoints: Founder voice is still thin, so the public brand risks sounding more product-led than person-led
The public footprint still looks narrow outside the website
Founder presence is still not doing enough visible work in public
blindSpots: The founder may have more perspective than the public-facing brand currently shows
There may be more standards, process, or product truth available than the public brand is currently using
opportunities: Turn the strongest product or service truth into clearer public-facing content
Use real customer-life situations as stronger content openings
Add more founder-led language so the business feels more distinct and human
advisorSnapshot.recommendedFocus: Make standards, proof, and process more visible so the business feels credible faster.

profile.intelligenceRead: The current scan suggests that the business has real product or service substance that can be turned into public signal. What looks underbuilt right now is that founder voice is still thin, so the public brand risks sounding more product-led than person-led. Best next step: make standards, proof, and process more visible so the business feels credible faster.

chosenMove.title: Trust Build System (Cautious Mode)
chosenMove.operatorRole: YEVIB acts with a controlled, evidence-limited strategy posture.
chosenMove.instruction: Use Trust Build System carefully and keep the move proportional to the current evidence base.
chosenMove.reason: The business needs stronger public proof, standards, and credibility so people trust it faster. Current qualification level requires a narrower execution posture.
actions: Run a narrower version of Trust Build System.
Build a 4-week post and image pack focused on trust, standards, and proof.
Turn one proof point each week into a social post, image, homepage statement, and comment/reply angle.
Use the next scan cycle to validate whether stronger execution is justified.
supportActions: Turn hidden credibility into visible credibility.
Make trust easier to feel at first glance.
Keep claims, promises, and campaign scope tightly tied to the current evidence.
chosenMove.constraint: Keep the strategy grounded in the real business, limit scope, and avoid presenting full execution certainty too early.
chosenMove.schedule: Start smaller • 3-5 trust-led outputs per week
chosenMove.successSignal: A cleaner, evidence-backed public signal that earns stronger strategy confidence next cycle.

executionPlan.title: Source Strengthening Required
executionPlan.summary: YEVIB needs stronger source material before it can run an active campaign for this business.
executionPlan.reason: The scan found low source confidence, so YEVIB should strengthen the evidence base before committing to execution.
executionPlan.operatorRole: YEVIB acts as a source-strengthening assistant until the business has enough visible evidence for a confident campaign.
actions: Collect clearer business source material before running a campaign.
Add or paste stronger founder, offer, proof, customer, and public activity signals.
Re-scan the business once the source base is stronger.
supportActions: Use the current scan as a starting diagnosis, not a final campaign commitment.
Prioritise source quality before output volume.
executionPlan.constraint: Do not frame YEVIB as actively running a campaign until source confidence and UBDG evidence strength improve.
executionPlan.schedule: Source strengthening first, then re-run the strategy cycle.
executionPlan.successSignal: The next scan has enough source evidence for a more confident diagnosis and execution plan.

limits: UBDG allows a useful recommendation, but wording should stay cautious and evidence limits should remain visible.
